message:
feat(dashboard): add health badge showing bv drift status

Adds a health status badge to the session dashboard that displays
project health based on beads viewer (bv) drift analysis.

New Features:
- HealthCheckMsg for async health status updates
- healthStatus field tracking: ok, warning, critical, no_baseline, unavailable
- healthMessage for detailed status explanation
- Integration with bv package for drift detection

Health Status Levels:
- ok:          All good, no drift detected
- warning:     Minor drift from baseline
- critical:    Significant drift requiring attention
- no_baseline: No baseline established yet
- unavailable: bv not installed or not in beads project

The health badge provides at-a-glance project state visibility without
leaving the dashboard, helping users identify when attention is needed.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
